items.title: DGR TO HOST EXCLUSIVE JOB FAIR FOR EX-SERVICEMEN AT DELHI
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence DGR TO HOST EXCLUSIVE JOB FAIR FOR EX-SERVICEMEN AT DELHI Posted On: 16 MAR 2026 11:38AM by PIB Delhi In a landmark initiative to empower and support the reintegration of Ex-Servicemen into the civilian workforce, the Directorate General Resettlement (DGR) , Department of Ex-Servicemen Welfare (MoD) is organizing a Job Fair for Ex-Servicemen on 20 Mar 2026 at…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends greetings to the Matua community on the occasion of Matua Dharma Mela marking 215th birth anniversary of Purna Brahma Shree Shree Harichand Thakur
